ddls:
CREATE TABLE "academic_years" (
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic year */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Name of the academic year (e.g., 2019-20) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the academic year is the current one */,
  "status" TEXT /* Describes the status of the academic year (e.g., Active, Completed, Planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "semesters" (
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each semester */,
  "semester_name" TEXT /* Name of the semester (e.g., Odd, Even) */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year the semester belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the semester */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the semester */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the semester is the current one */,
  "status" TEXT /* Describes the status of the semester (e.g., Active, Completed, Planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_semesters_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the academic program */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor, Master, Doctorate) */,
  "duration_years" INTEGER /* Duration of the program in years */,
  "is_graduate_program" INTEGER /* Indicates if the program is a graduate program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program the student is enrolled in */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year the student is enrolled in */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester the student is enrolled in */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission to the university */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date */,
  "academic_standing" TEXT /* Current academic standing (e.g., Good Standing, Probation, Suspended) */,
  "financial_aid_status" TEXT /* Status of financial aid (e.g., Eligible, Ineligible, Pending) */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student is an international student */,
  "major_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the major the student is pursuing */,
  "minor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the minor the student is pursuing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student's academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student the record belongs to */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year the record belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester the record belongs to */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Student's GPA for the semester */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Number of credits earned by the student for the semester */,
  "cumulative_gpa" REAL /* Cumulative GPA for the student */,
  "total_credits_earned" INTEGER /* Total number of credits earned by the student */,
  "semester_status" TEXT /* Status of the student for the semester (e.g., Enrolled, Withdrawn, Graduated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_academic_records_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_academic_records_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program the course belongs to */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* List of prerequisite courses */,
  "is_core_course" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is a core course */,
  "is_elective" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is an elective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the enrollment belongs to */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student the enrollment belongs to */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year the enrollment belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester the enrollment belongs to */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Student's grade for the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of enrollment in the course */,
  "withdrawal_date" TEXT /* Date of withdrawal from the course, if applicable */,
  "is_repeated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is being repeated by the student */,
  "final_exam_date" TEXT /* Date of the final exam for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollments_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_members" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Faculty member's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Faculty member's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* Faculty member's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Faculty member's phone number */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date of hiring */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held by the faculty member (e.g., Professor, Assistant Professor) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "teaching_experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_offerings" (
  "offering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course offering */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the offering belongs to */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year the offering belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester the offering belongs to */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "class_size" INTEGER /* Number of students in the class */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the course offering (e.g., Room 101, Online) */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule of the course (e.g., MWF 10:00-11:15, TTh 13:00-14:45) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_offerings_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student the advisor is assigned to */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the faculty member assigned as the advisor */,
  "advising_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the advisor started advising the student */,
  "advising_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the advisor stopped advising the student, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty_members ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_advisors_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic performance metric */,
  "academic_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year the metric belongs to */,
  "semester_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the semester the metric belongs to */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic program the metric belongs to */,
  "appeared" INTEGER /* Number of students who appeared for the semester */,
  "passed" INTEGER /* Number of students who passed the semester */,
  "pass_percentage" REAL /* Pass percentage of students for the semester */,
  "dropout_rate" REAL /* Dropout rate for the program in the semester */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA for the program in the semester */,
  "average_credits_earned" INTEGER /* Average number of credits earned by students in the program for the semester */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_metrics_semester_id FOREIGN KEY ("semester_id") REFERENCES semesters ("semester_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_metrics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES academic_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_performance_metrics_academic_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_year_id") REFERENCES academic_years ("academic_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "can_access_financial_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can access financial data */,
  "can_access_personal_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can access personal data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user role */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who logged in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the user logged in */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for login (e.g., Desktop, Mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
